title: Discord REST client lands, zero deps
description: bumper now pulls changelog reports over the raw Discord REST API with no client library, and traces every run to <#0000000000000000000>.
highlights: Raw fetch-based Discord client — no discord.js, no new dependencies
One-pass buffer resolves the second-most-recent report by default
Every run posts an observability trace to <#0000000000000000000>; the token is never logged
